name: Pory
description: Pory — No-code app builder that turns Airtable data into web apps, member portals, and directories.

seo.title: Pory — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Pory: Pory — No-code app builder that turns Airtable data into web apps, member portals, and directories.

when_to_use: Airtable database turned into a searchable directory app
Member portal with gated content built from Airtable data
Job board launched from an Airtable base in hours
No-code app for a community resource library from Airtable
Client-facing portal powered by existing Airtable data

pros: Member portals with Stripe gated content
Decent CSS control via custom code blocks
Directory templates work out of the box
cons: Locked to Airtable as the data source
Logic limited compared to Softr or Glide
Small team means slow feature releases
review.verdict: Solid Airtable frontend for directories and portals, but competitors have outpaced it on logic and speed.
review.best_for: Airtable users who need a quick members-only portal or directory site
review.not_for: Teams needing complex workflows or non-Airtable data sources

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
